result: TIMEOUT - Capture Calcutta (Early Game Victory) not achieved in 6 rounds

lessons.text: [Round 1][Purchase Units][Early][Southern Expansion] Japan's initial purchase of 2 tanks, 2 infantry, and 2 artillery was balanced but lacked focus on infantry, which are crucial for sustained ground operations.

structured.trigger: Round 1, Japan has 2 tanks, 2 infantry, and 2 artillery in Japan, while Allies have 3 infantry in Kwangtung and 2 in Yunnan.
structured.mistake: Round 1 Purchase: bought 2 tanks instead of 4 infantry, limiting ground force expansion.
structured.action: In Purchase Units phase of round 1, buy 4 infantry to strengthen ground forces for future attacks.
structured.expected_outcome: Increased ground force strength, enabling attacks on Kwangtung and Yunnan in subsequent rounds.
structured.legal_action_required: buy 4 infantry

lessons.text: [Round 2][Combat Move][Early][Southern Expansion] Japan failed to secure the 19 Sea Zone, which delayed amphibious operations.

structured.trigger: Round 2, 19 Sea Zone has 1 Japanese transport, Allies have 1 destroyer in adjacent 20 Sea Zone.
structured.mistake: Round 2 Combat Move: did not attack 20 Sea Zone with 1 destroyer to clear path for transports, Allies still have 1 destroyer in 20 Sea Zone
structured.action: In Combat Move phase of round 2, attack 20 Sea Zone with available naval forces to secure transport routes.
structured.expected_outcome: Secured 19 Sea Zone, enabling safe transport of troops for land operations.
structured.legal_action_required: attack 20 Sea Zone with available naval forces

lessons.text: [Round 3][Noncombat Move][Early][Southern Expansion] Japan's transports were not optimally repositioned, delaying troop movements to key territories.

structured.trigger: Round 3, Japan has 2 transports in 6 Sea Zone, needs to move 2 infantry to 19 Sea Zone.
structured.mistake: Round 3 Noncombat Move: failed to move 2 infantry from Japan via 6 Sea Zone to 19 Sea Zone for next round's operations.
structured.action: In Noncombat Move phase of round 3, transport 2 infantry from Japan via 6 Sea Zone to 19 Sea Zone.
structured.expected_outcome: Efficient troop deployment to 19 Sea Zone, preparing for land assaults in next round.
structured.legal_action_required: transport 2 infantry from Japan via 6 Sea Zone to 19 Sea Zone

lessons.text: [Round 4][Purchase Units][Mid][Southern Expansion] Japan's purchase of 3 tanks, 3 infantry, and 2 artillery was effective but lacked additional transports to enhance mobility.

structured.trigger: Round 4, Japan has 3 tanks, 3 infantry, and 2 artillery in Japan, needs more transports for mobility across the Sea of Japan.
structured.mistake: Round 4 Purchase: did not buy additional transport, limiting troop deployment options across the Sea of Japan.
structured.action: In Purchase Units phase of round 4, buy 1 transport to increase troop mobility across the Sea of Japan.
structured.expected_outcome: Enhanced mobility, allowing rapid deployment of forces to strategic territories.
structured.legal_action_required: buy 1 transport

lessons.text: [Round 5][Combat Move][Mid][Southern Expansion] Japan missed the opportunity to capture Kwangtung due to insufficient ground forces in position.

structured.trigger: Round 5, Kwangtung has 2 UK infantry, Japan has 3 infantry and 1 artillery in Kiangsi.

structured.action: In Combat Move phase of round 5, attack Kwangtung with 3 infantry and 1 artillery from Kiangsi.

structured.legal_action_required: attack Kwangtung with 3 infantry 1 artillery from Kiangsi

lessons.text: [Round 6][Noncombat Move][Mid][Southern Expansion] Japan did not adequately reinforce frontlines, leaving key territories vulnerable.
